prompt: In this repo (mixdog), create a new test script scripts/anthropic-maxtokens-test.mjs using node:test + node:assert/strict that covers resolveMaxTokens from src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/providers/anthropic-oauth.mjs (exported via the _test export). Cover: (1) claude-sonnet-5 returns 65536 with the shipped catalog or fallback, (2) an unknown model id falls back to a sane >=8192 value, (3) MIXDOG_ANTHROPIC_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=32768 overrides the result and an invalid value like '0' does not; save/restore the env var around each case. Run the test with node to confirm it passes before finishing. Only add that one file; do not modify existing files.
